description_long: This is a large, L-shaped office desk with a modern design, featuring a rectangular main work surface and an attached rounded extension. The desk top appears to be made of dark wood or laminate, with a subtle grain pattern and a cable management grommet visible on the main surface. The supporting frame is constructed from sturdy metal, finished in a matte black or dark gray color, and includes both straight and angled legs for stability. The extension section is supported by a single leg and a modesty panel runs along the back of the main desk. The desk is elevated on small feet, some of which appear to have wheels for mobility. The overall design is functional and professional, suitable for a contemporary office environment.
description: A modern, L-shaped office desk with a dark wood or laminate top, metal frame, and a rounded extension for extra workspace.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shape, with the main rectangular surface and rounded extension clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the modesty panel, metal frame, and the rounded extension to the left.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main work surface, modesty panel, and the supporting legs beneath the desk.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite side, emphasizing the rounded extension and the cable grommet on the main surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge of the main rectangular surface, with the rounded extension to the user's left. The cable grommet and modesty panel indicate the front and back, respectively.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or executive office desk
